title: Create: Coins Arise
description: Create: Coins Arise is a Create: Numismatics addon which aims to add a balanced way of producing coins and giving coins more functionality.
body: # ⚠️ Deprecation Warning Create: Coins Arise will receive an update in the near future which will remove the recipes for coin creation (items will stay) and instead there will be features centered around the use of coins. The server owner should be responsible for adding a balanced way for the creation of coins! # Create: Coins Arise Coins Arise is an addon that adds simple, yet balanced recipes for creating Create: Numismatics items, aswell as (soon) adding new ways to utilize your coins. ## Features ### Casting Mold Casting mold is used as one of the last steps of creating coins. There are variations for spur, bevel and sprocket. You will need to put the coins into a bank terminal or other exchange to get higher coins. This was done to make it more balanced. ### Molten Ores To create casting molds, you will have to deploy molten ores on your plates. Copper stands for spur, zinc for bevels and iron for sprockets. ### Plates There are plates and unprocessed plates, each having a diamond and emerald version. You need diamond plates for creating spur and bevel casting molds and emerald plates to create sprocket casting molds. ### Splattered Grains Splattered grains are the first step towards plates. You can obtain these by pressing deepslate diamond ore and deepslate emerald ore with a mechanical press. Deepslate diamond ore has a 33% chance of dropping, while emerald has 80%
